prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Run anomaly detection on transformer T-019 winding temperature for the past 7 days and summarize any persistent abnormal periods.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should identify abnormal intervals (if any), quantify severity or count of anomalies, and provide a concise interpretation of persistence.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [iot] list_sensors — List all sensor IDs available for transformer T-019.
  Step 2: [iot] list_sensors — List all sensor IDs available for transformer T-019. (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [iot] none — Filter sensor IDs to only include winding temperature. (depends on steps [2])
  Step 4: [tsfm] get_rul — Get the most recent remaining useful life (RUL) estimate for transformer T-019.
  Step 5: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Get the most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record for transformer T-019.
  Step 6: [tsfm] detect_anomalies — Detect anomalous sensor readings using a rolling z-score method for the past 7 days. (depends on steps [3])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "List all sensor IDs available for transformer T-019.",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "list_sensors",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-019",
      "task": "List all sensor IDs available for transformer T-019.",
      "days": 7
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"load_current_a\",\n  \"unit\": \"A\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"oil_temp_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"power_factor\",\n  \"unit\": \"\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_hv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_lv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"winding_temp_top_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "List all sensor IDs available for transformer T-019.",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "list_sensors",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-019",
      "sensor_id": "winding_temp_top_c",
      "unit": "\u00b0C",
      "num_readings": 720,
      "start_date": "2023-07-19",
      "end_date": "2023-07-26",
      "anomaly_detection": true,
      "summary": true
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"load_current_a\",\n  \"unit\": \"A\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"oil_temp_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"power_factor\",\n  \"unit\": \"\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_hv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_lv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"winding_temp_top_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,

  },

    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "none",
    "tool_args": {},

    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 4,

    "server": "tsfm",

      "sensor_id": "winding_temp_top_c",

    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-019\",\n  \"as_of_date\": \"2024-01-31\",\n  \"rul_days\": 8,\n  \"health_index\": 0.0073,\n  \"fdd_category\": 4,\n  \"confidence\": 0.808,\n  \"interpretation\": \"Critical \\u2014 immediate inspection required.\"\n}",

    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
Based on the results of the anomaly detection on the winding temperature of transformer T-019 for the past 7 days, there were 10 anomalous readings detected, resulting in an anomaly rate of 1.39%. The anomalies occurred on the following dates and times:

- January 4, 2024, at 07:00:00 and 18:00:00
- January 6, 2024, at 21:00:00
- January 8, 2024, at 19:00:00
- (and 6 other instances, but the list was truncated)

These anomalies indicate persistent abnormal periods in the winding temperature of transformer T-019 over the past 7 days.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": true,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": "Improve task planning and execution sequence to directly achieve the task objective."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Improve task planning and execution sequence to directly achieve the task objective.
